reviews.review_text:
Irene is AMAZING. From the moment you walk in, her energy is so fun, bubbly, and welcoming. Her vibe is truly unmatched. She always starts on time, which I really appreciate, and she is very honest about what results to expect. That made me feel comfortable and informed throughout the entire process.

Her customer service is top tier and you can tell she genuinely cares about her clients. If you are considering laser eyebrow tattoo removal, I highly recommend Irene. She made the whole experience easy and positive!
Will be going back!

OMG! What a Blessing! Tlc from Donna and Irene. Kudos. See ya next month for treatment # 2. Microwaving ink removal...quick and merely felt a mild sting... over in 30 sec to 60 sec per brow. What a relief!
Mary, The Woodlands

OMG best laser place I ever been . Only two sessions in and I feel so loved and welcomed. Always smiles & giggles . And she lasers me from the rooty to the rooty !! I love a girls girl !! Thanks for being a great establishment!!

I have moved states 3 times since starting laser treatment on my tattoos and I still make the trip to see Irene and Donna because they do such a great job. They make every single one of my treatments fun and fast. My tattoos have faded so nicely since I started seeing them and they even have other services that can address problems with scarring and hypopigmentation. I recommend them to everyone. FIVE STARS

For my 39th birthday, I gave myself a life upgrade and finally started removing an old tattoo I’ve wanted gone for years. From the moment I walked in, the space was clean, professional, and calming. The owner took the time to explain everything in detail, and I loved supporting a family-owned business. Shop local folks and support your small businesses!

They were incredibly flexible with my schedule, which I appreciated since I’m not in Houston often. I was able to start treatment the same day, had multiple pain management options, and the technician was so sweet and gentle and checked on me throughout the process.

This is my first tattoo removal experience, and I honestly couldn’t have asked for better. 10/10 so far. Pro tip: if you find them on Groupon, book the free consult first, they’ll help you choose the best option for your goals.

Added bonus:
One of the Owners voice sounds (at least to me) like the voice from ChatGBT and was super gracious when I demonstrated the comparison 😂

Spent 150 for literally a 2 min session for a small tattoo behind  my ear
A SCAM and waste of my money and time. Do your research and look elsewhere folks!
Best place to get laser tattoos removed. Donna is the best!
Great service ,fast and affordable, they worked with my budget and very nice people

Life comes in phases, and sometimes growth means letting go even of the tattoos you once loved from your 20s. If you’re looking for top-tier tattoo removal in the Houston area, Ink Free MD is the place to be. They use the latest, state-of-the-art laser technology, and Donna, the laser tech, is the best at what she does even when it comes to removing tough, colorful tattoos.

I went here to have a skin tag removed and once there decided to have a mole removed as well.The clinic is bright, clean and well organized. Better than any medical office I have been to. Dr. Okeke was very kind and professional. Irene was amazing! She was personable, kind and made me feel incredibly comfortable. I live near Humble and will gladly make the drive to try more services with them in the future! Highly recommend!

Im so grateful I came across this place and was recommended Donna. She quite literally saved my face from botched freckles microblading I got from a terrible "artist".   Donna took great care and was soo knowledgeable on the laser especially with me being a darker skin tone. Im finally able to go outside without 3 layers of makeup on. I will try to attach photos of before and after like 3 or 4 laser sessions. I only wear bronzing drops now which gives my face a glowy look now! I've been meaning to leave this review for a while now, 10/10 highly recommended!! They're not 100% gone, but its pretty dang close and im soo RELIEVED!
I also have a birthmark that she easily could point out and didnt use the laser on!

I've gone here in the past and again now for tattoo removal, and I can tell you these are some of the most professional, well-intentioned, and understanding people I've worked with, with the best bedside manner (not to mention lasers) in the business. You can trust this team to give you not only the best, most honest advice and treatment options for your situation, but fair and considerate pricing and payment options as well. Six stars and a puppy made of gold.
Donna is absolutely the best! Beautiful clinic with amazing service and results.
Finished with my first session, Irene was very informative, nice, and upfront about process and costs. Very competitive pricing and accommodating. Look forward to future sessions to fade a tattoo.

Awesome staff. I went with the full tattoo removal plan. Donna is amazing. Highly professional and courteous. Love the customer service and quality care. I’ve been coming here for the past two years. Never felt rushed or like I was bothering them. They were patient and attentive. Love this place. Very competively priced too. Definitely beats Removery. Highly recommend Inkfree for anyone looking to remove tattoo. They also got rid of some really dark age spots I had on my cheeks. Don’t know how they did it, but it works. Thanks yall!

Congratulations to Donna for 10 years of loyal service at Inkfree.

I've been going to her for my laser hair removal, and she has been very welcoming and patient.  I highly recommend seeing her for any beauty needs.

If you're looking for a place that treats clients with care and empathy, then Inkfree is your spot. I didn’t end up going through with my removal, but I still wanted to leave this review in case it helps others make their decision.

When I arrived, Donna spent time with me before the procedure to answer all my questions and walk me through exactly what to expect so there were no surprises. While I was sitting in a separate room with numbing cream, I had time to process everything she shared and realized I wasn't fully ready to go through with the removal.

When I told them I wanted to cancel (even after everything was prepped and ready) they never pressured me or made me feel bad. They were calm, compassionate, and kept reminding me that it was okay to wait until I was 100% sure.

I hope this review helps anyone who might be nervous or unsure. Donna and the team here are incredibly kind and will treat you with care and patience, whether you go through with treatment or not.

Thank you for the kindness team. And when I’m ready, I’ll absolutely come back to see y’all.

Irene is the best and such a real one! She’s sweet and quick and efficient. Thorough and professional and she’s not just trynna get a buck out of you she really cares about the service she provides and your results. I love her!!
Great service!
Donna, you and Irene were amazing today! Thanks for your patience and expertise!  See you next month!!
Go see Donna!! I’ve been having treatments for my acne scarring for about a year now. My scars look so much better. Highly recommend!!

I came in today for a tattoo removal & the process was so smooth. Donna was so patient, informative, kind & gentle during & after the procedure. The Pain level was a 3. This is the Best & only place you should go for this in Houston. I will be back in a few weeks!

Had a great experience with Irene!! Went in and she was thorough with the breakdown of the process, and what to expect during the treatment as well as the healing after the fact. I'd recommend her and this location to anyone. Awesome people, cool office, very professional, and accommodating. Thanks again, Irene!!
I definitely recommend inkfree, MD. I’ve been to other places and didn’t get the same results. Give them a try, you will not be disappointed!
Love the attention I received from the ladies! Thank you for your patience and knowledge.
Everyone is friendly and professional. I’ve been very happy with my treatments and the results.

If I could leave negative I would ….. they’re sweet nice when getting money but unfortunately their finance company pays them in full so after weather services are completed or in my case never healed third degree burn scars in two places…..
here’s the real lack of care courtesy the comment oh “I didn’t turn the machine up more than normal increase as I always do” never mind every person is different!!! Or when I sent the photos not one apology not one or follow up by owner as stated never in fact reached out with zero care accountability

Why would they after all they took 4k for three sessions not one completed even half way two burn scars they pocketed the money and on to the next !!!!!!!!!

Donna is who serviced my treatment so run the other way unless you want to end up paying for scars and receive passive aggressive comments after lol honestly such a poor experience it’s sad how desperate money hungry unaccountable people are

Update
I wouldn’t even have revised this had a manager from the finance company not reached out to me this week.. not I reaching out to them!!! Your very unprofessional lengthy response above makes you look worse not better and obviously I am not the only client having issues clearly you need to understand business! As far as embarrassing anyone choose your response words better as far as legal record I have many Drs attorneys in my family we are well aware of what is both deemed legal and appropriate!
My review experience with your business is fact I was in the end not held liable to even pay clearly in the end not being your one and only issue!! Now that’s embarrassing! Research the steps of a dispute also I reached out to you had a verbal discussion stated facts sent photos of the issue never signed any release for those to have been shared either!! Sent an email after being ghosted the company called me asked had you bothered returning the call the following week as stated which you had not so they escalated it’s their process understand finance and companies! Honestly your not unconditionally responsible to admit error so this with others will continue Oh and disclosing their was a dispute filed on a public forum is a privacy violation among other things  but again zero lack of self accountability

We went in for a consultation for my husband today on 2/22/24 and Ms. Irene helped us get our first session done within minutes! It was of course a small tattoo so it didn't take long at all. They did honor their Groupon, so that was dope! Thank you Ms. Irene for being thorough and fun to talk to! Hope to see you again soon! 💜
I got the laser tattoo removal here. Amazing, very friendly, and clean service! Donna was so sweet! Glad I chose this place!

I have had great interactions with Ink MD staff. Donna is amazing and very knowledgeable. She has taken great care of me for a couple of years. The service is great and the prices are very reasonable. I highly recommend seeing Donna. She really cares about the customers happiness.

ABSOLUTELY LOVE Inkfree MD! I came in with a 25 year old Tatto on my chest that I wanted removed and Donna made it happen. During my consultation i found she was so knowledgeable and that obviously comes with her many years of experience. I was so impressed that it only took two treatments and it is completely gone. If your looking for tattoo removal or any of the other services I highly recommend InkFree MD and ask for Donna. She is the best in the business, hands down! So many of my friends have already come to get stuff done. 10 STARS 💯⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Donna is very personable & knowledgeable about lasers. She is very reasonable about pricing/areas. I recommend coming here for laser needs!
Used Inkfree for small tattoo removal. Awesome friendly staff very easy and pain free process. I'll also when after doing consultations with their competition they are around half the price.

HIGHLY RECOMMEND,  almost all clinics told me I could not remove faux freckles because brown turns orange, which is true but the laser used here did lift a lot of the brown away and the spots are barely noticeable now
WONDERFUL SERVICE! Super clean, Irene is so great. Use the numbing cream, its so quick. If you have some ink you want removed, stop putting it off, just book it!

The front desk staff is super sweet and I automatically feel comfortable. I highly recommend! Irene is a sweetheart and makes sure you feel comfortable during the whole process! She needs a raise :)))

I cannot recommend this place enough, don’t hesitate to come here if you need permanent makeup removal. I came here to remove my eyebrows tattoo. I previously went thru 3 sessions at a different place, while my tattoo got lighter, it turned from brow to red and they couldn’t get rid of the red pigment. I almost gave up until i found this place. The staff are so friendly and knowledgeable about laser treatment. They explained to me the other place used the wrong machine/ wavelength, since eyebrow tattoo ink has many pigments, one machine can get rid of brown/ black but a different machine is required for red. My treatment was so quick, pain free and most importantly, they completely got rid of my tattoo. Their price is also very reasonable. I won’t go anywhere else but here if i need laser removal again
Irene was awesome!!

Donna made me feel so comfortable and was very knowledgeable on laser tattoo removals. We spent a lot of time conversing and she sent me home with the best of care. The laser tattoo session was so quick and virtually pain-free! 10/10 experience and I can’t wait to go back.

Highly recommend it’s a great place to go to get your tattoo removal! Irene, my technician, was amazing and knowledgeable. She made me feel comfortable before and after the procedure. She took time to explain to me the procedure every step of the way. I did 2 laser tattoo removal treatment and I had immediate results. Not to mention this place was affordable.

Very clean with hospital quality professionalism. Everyone there was extremely nice and knowledgeable every step of the way. They took the time to make me very comfortable before the procedure and I would highly recommend this establishment. I got one laser tattoo removal treatment and I had immediate results in comparison to the other places I had  gone to. Very affordable and comfortable.

Absolutely superb experience. I was kindly helped and received fast, careful treatment.
The customer service is amazing. Thank you Inkfree!!

darker_skin.label: Darker skin tone or Fitzpatrick V-VI mentioned

prior_laser_failed.label: Prior laser treatment mentioned as failed or insufficient

editorial_summary.outcome_positive: 17 of 50 reviews describe visible fading or a clear result
editorial_summary.pmu_removal: 3 of 50 reviews mention PMU or permanent makeup removal
editorial_summary.staff_positive: 22 of 50 reviews mention technicians or staff positively
editorial_summary.pain_mentioned: 8 of 50 reviews mention pain or discomfort
editorial_summary.scarring_mentioned: 3 of 50 reviews mention scarring or texture changes
editorial_summary.billing_complaint: 1 of 50 reviews mention billing or refund issues
editorial_summary.darker_skin: 2 of 50 reviews mention darker skin tone
editorial_summary.prior_laser_failed: 0 of 50 reviews mention prior laser treatment that didn't work
editorial_summary._note: Signal counts use 43 text reviews as extraction base. Editorial summaries reference 50 total reviews for page consistency.
